title: 2pc Heavy Duty Plastic Cap Knee Pads for Work Gardening Flooring Joint Support
description:
If you’re someone who regularly participates in manual labor, you understand the importance of a good pair of knee pads to protect and support your knees, back, joints and more! Whatever back-breaking, sweat-inducing work you’re taking on, like gardening, painting, roofing, flooring or landscaping to name just a few. It is tough enough as it is without adding sore joints and bruised knees into the mix. Insert comfortable, adjustable and protective knee pads here, so you can take on home or work projects without bruising, stiffness or pain to hold you back. Our knees are the most weight-bearing joints in our body, absorbing shock and supporting us in every move our body makes

2pc Heavy Duty Plastic Cap Knee Pads for Work Gardening Flooring Joint Support

If you’re someone who regularly participates in manual labor, you understand the importance of a good pair of knee pads to protect and support your knees, back, joints and more! Whatever back-breaking, sweat-inducing work you’re taking on, like gardening, painting, roofing, flooring or landscaping to name just a few. It is tough enough as it is without adding sore joints and bruised knees into the mix. Insert comfortable, adjustable and protective knee pads here, so you can take on home or work projects without bruising, stiffness or pain to hold you back.

Key Features

  • ADJUSTABLE TAILORED FIT: Adjustable elastic straps with hook and loop fasteners allow these knee pads to be tailored to the physiology of your knees; easy to put on, adjust and remove, the knee pads can be worn for long periods of time, as they can be tailored to your individual needs
  • INJURY AND JOINT PREVENTION: The most weight-bearing joint in our body, our knees absorb shock and support us in every kind of activity we do; having extra joint support with knee pads, especially if you’re planning to be kneeling a lot is paramount for the longevity of your knee health
  • MINIMIZE PAIN: These protective knee pads help protect you from experiencing chronic joint issues such as bursitis or arthritis and can help to minimize strains, pains and aches on your knees when taking on any kind of work or DIY home project
  • MULTI PURPOSE KNEE PADS: These durable safety protection knee pads are great for a multitude of activities including gardening, installing flooring, roofing, landscaping, construction, automotive or mechanic work, home improvement and DIY projects, cleaning and more; they are also suitable for rock climbing, volleyball, skateboarding and general joint support
  • QUALITY CONSTRUCTION: Heavy duty plastic knee caps and comfortable, breathable terylene cloth panels panels make for a pair or durable, long lasting knee pads for all your work and leisure activities

Product Specifications

  • MPN: ASR2PCKP
  • UPC: 706569067651
  • Color: Black
  • Size: One Size

Our knees are the most weight-bearing joints in our body, absorbing shock and supporting us in every move our body makes. If you’re planning to spend a lot of time at work or at home completing a project that has you on your knees, or constantly adjusting from standing to kneeling, you should be wearing knee pads for safety, protection, support and injury prevention.

Durable, multifunctional and easily adjustable, these knee pads can be worn for a multitude of different activities like gardening, construction, landscaping, DIY projects around the house or installing flooring. Notably, these knee pads can be used in sport situations and are suitable for skateboarding, hiking or trekking, volleyball and rock climbing for knee protection.

Made with heavy-duty plastic knee caps, easy to adjust hook and loop fasteners and comfortable terylene cloth construction, these knee pads make for a durable, long-lasting pair of knee protection and joint support no matter what project you plan to take on.
